ref.title: Magic Initiate (Druid)
body: From the Druid list you learn two cantrips (Guidance and Produce Flame) and one level-1 spell (Faerie Fire). Wisdom is the spellcasting ability, so the numbers match your class casting: save DC {dc}, spell attack {atk}.
You can cast Faerie Fire once per long rest without a slot, and also with your spell slots. Cantrips are at-will.

grantsPool.label: Faerie Fire — free
grantsPool.reminder: Magic Initiate: free cast of Faerie Fire (no slot).

spells.name: Guidance
spells.sub: cantrip · +1d4 to one ability check · Concentration

ref.title: Lucky (Origin Feat)
body: You have Luck Points equal to your Proficiency Bonus, regained on a long rest.
Advantage: when you roll a d20 for a d20 Test (attack roll, ability check, or saving throw), you can spend 1 Luck Point to give yourself Advantage.
Disadvantage: when a creature makes an attack roll against you, you can spend 1 Luck Point to impose Disadvantage on that roll.

grantsPool.label: Luck Points
grantsPool.reminder: Lucky: gain Advantage on a d20 Test, or impose Disadvantage on an attack against you.

ref.title: Alert (Origin Feat)
body: Initiative Proficiency: you add your Proficiency Bonus to Initiative.
Initiative Swap: right after rolling Initiative, you may trade your result with a willing ally's — push the right teammate to the top of the order, or drop your control before the enemy acts.

ref.title: Magic Initiate (Wizard)
body: From the Wizard list you learn two cantrips (Toll the Dead and Prestidigitation) and one level-1 spell (Detect Magic). Intelligence is the spellcasting ability: save DC {dc}, spell attack {atk}.
You can cast Detect Magic once per long rest without a slot, and also with your spell slots. Cantrips are at-will.

grantsPool.label: Detect Magic — free
grantsPool.reminder: Magic Initiate: free cast of Detect Magic (no slot).

ref.title: Magic Initiate (Cleric)
body: From the Cleric list you learn two cantrips (Light and Resistance) and one level-1 spell (Healing Word). Wisdom is the spellcasting ability: save DC {dc}, spell attack {atk}.
You can cast Healing Word once per long rest without a slot, and also with your spell slots. Cantrips are at-will.

grantsPool.label: Healing Word — free
grantsPool.reminder: Magic Initiate: free cast of Healing Word (no slot).

spells.name: Light
spells.sub: cantrip · an object sheds bright light
